content.text: Building the deliverable->evidence map from the authoritative spec before any claim.

input.description: confirm what actually landed on the merge target

content.text:
Deliverable->evidence map (authoritative spec, 3 deliverables):
- Backend serializer change: merged to the merge target (abc1234 on origin/main).
- Crucial authoring UI: registered on the WRONG surface (default admin), and the fix to the correct configuration surface is stranded on an already-merged branch.
- Frontend banner: merged to the merge target.

NOT done: the authoring UI is on the wrong surface and its fix is stranded off the merge target. I will not report 'no blockers' until that commit lands on the merge target and the authoring UI is verified on the correct configuration surface.
